# Q 

2 

LEATHERCOAT REDEFINED

## Interior / coating

### Semi-aniline and nappa protectant

Q² LeatherCoat REDEFINED is an easy-to-use leather sealant designed to protect modern automotive leather. After proper cleaning, it is applied in a single, even layer to create a hydrophobic barrier that protects leather against liquids, sweat, dirt, and dye transfer from clothing. The coating leaves an invisible layer that does not change the look or feel of the leather.

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2024/01/productmain_1700x1645px_q2m_leather-coat_500_2023-1024x991.png)

[Technical Details](#technical-details)

## Easy to use leather sealant.

Q² LeatherCoat REDEFINED helps preserve the original appearance of leather upholstery by protecting it from daily contamination and UV exposure. It simplifies maintenance and keeps leather looking clean and factory matte for longer.

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/benefiticons79.svg)

UV PROTECTION 

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/benefiticons21.svg)

FOR ALL TYPES OF LEATHER 

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/benefiticons14.svg)

EASY MAINTENANCE 

what makes

Q2 LEATHERCOAT REDEFINED so special?

Hydrophobic protection against liquids, dirt and sweat

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2023/12/leathercoat_2-1024x576.jpg)

CAPACITIES

Real World Lifespan

>3 months

BARRIER AGAINST LIQUID

YES

SURFACE

EVERY LEATHER

## HOW TO USE

Q 

2 

LEATHERCOAT REDEFINED

01
Clean the leather thoroughly before application. 

02
Apply the product to a soft microfibre cloth or applicator. 

03
Spread evenly over the leather surface. 

04
Allow the product to be absorbed by the leather. 

05
Wipe off any visual residue. 

### Watch
product
video

## FREQUENTLY ASKED
QUESTIONS

01
What type of leather is Q² LeatherCoat REDEFINED suitable for? 

It is designed primarily for semi-aniline and nappa automotive leather.

02
Does it change the look or feel of the leather? 

No. It leaves an invisible layer with a factory matte finish.

03
How long does the protection last? 

Over three months, depending on use and conditions.

04
Does it protect against dye transfer from clothing? 

Yes, it will help to some extent reduce staining on jeans and other fabrics. For maximum protection against such contamination, Q² LeatherShield is best.

05
Is proper cleaning required before application? 

Yes. Clean leather is essential for good bonding and performance.

[FIND MORE ANSWERS](https://gyeon.zendesk.com/hc/en-us/sections/360000254258-Q-LeatherCoat)

## Recommended Pairing

We recommend complementary products that perfectly match your current one, creating a complete and convenient KIT. Together, they deliver the best performance and a seamless user experience.
